query:
SELECT c.id, c.valor_principal, c.taxa_juros, c.modalidade, c.numero_parcelas, c.valor_parcela, c.status, cl.nome
FROM contratos c 
LEFT JOIN clientes cl ON c.cliente_id = cl.id 
WHERE c.user_id = 4684 
ORDER BY c.id DESC 
LIMIT 10;
